title: Oliva Boutique Hotel
description: A renovation project in Oliva where we are transforming an existing building into a luxury boutique hotel. The entire concept is designed by Hans van Dalen, featuring interiors fully furnished with Habitat One pieces—from the walls and finishes to the bathrooms and every detail in between.
meta_description: A renovation project in Oliva where we are transforming an existing building into a luxury boutique hotel. The entire concept is designed by Hans van Dalen, featuring interiors fully furnished with Habitat One pieces, from the walls and finishes to the bathrooms and every detail in between

title: Benissa
description: A standout modern villa in Benissa, designed with every luxury detail in mind. This project was once again created by Hans van Dalen, with the Habitat One team bringing the renovation to life. Featuring beautiful materials such as flexible stone and high-end bathroom finishes, the villa is a true statement of design and craftsmanship.
meta_title: Modern Luxury Villa Renovation in Benissa by Habitat One
meta_description: Discover a standout modern villa renovation in Benissa, crafted by Hans van Dalen and Habitat One, featuring luxury finishes and flexible stone materials.

title: Vila Yojosa
description: Villa Yojosa is a waterfront apartment with breathtaking sea views, currently undergoing a complete transformation into a modern, high-end living space. The renovation focuses on clean lines, refined finishes, and a seamless connection between interior and exterior. The project is led by architect Hans van Dalen, who is closely guiding every stage to ensure a cohesive and sophisticated design. The Habitat One team is once again bringing the vision to life, supplying beautiful, high-quality materials that elevate every detail of the space—from surfaces to bespoke finishes.
meta_title: Villa Yojosa Waterfront Apartment Modern Renovation
meta_description: Villa Yojosa is being transformed into a modern, high-end waterfront apartment with refined finishes and seamless indoor-outdoor living.

title: Montgo
description: Nestled at the foot of the Montgó, this villa is currently undergoing a complete renovation, transforming it into a refined and contemporary living space. The design has once again been created by Hans van Dalen, bringing a clear architectural vision that blends elegance with functionality. Using carefully selected materials from Habitat One, every element—from textures to finishes—is chosen to create a harmonious and high-end result. This project reflects our commitment to craftsmanship, detail, and creating timeless homes in exceptional locations.
meta_title: Montgo Villa Renovation with Contemporary Design
meta_description: Complete renovation of a villa at Montgó's foot, featuring Hans van Dalen's contemporary design and high-end materials from Habitat One.

title: Townhouse Benissa
description: The Townhouse Benissa project is a true transformation, turning a once-derelict property into a calm and beautifully designed living space. What was once a ruin is now a serene retreat, where modern design meets authentic character. As shown in the photos, at Habitat One we have the ability to look beyond what something is and envision what it can become. Hans van Dalen leads the design process, while the Habitat One team brings each project to life with carefully selected, high-quality materials and refined finishes.
meta_title: Townhouse Benissa: Contemporary Renovation in Benissa
meta_description: Townhouse Benissa transforms a derelict property into a serene, modern home with natural light, soft tones, and authentic character in Benissa.
